method: Loaded dwg_graph_ir.json, iterated d['block_definitions'] (407 entries) and summed len(b['def_entities']) per entry; cross-checked against sum(b['entity_count']) which matched exactly (28183).
commands: total=sum(len(b['def_entities']) for b in bd); total2=sum(b.get('entity_count',0) for b in bd); print(len(bd), total, total2)
